materialEffectsSub: Each material and the stats it can grant by slot and tier. Filter by the stats you want to min-max.
toggleNoPriceTitle: Toggle visibility of items without a price
openSteamAppTitle: Open this item directly in the Steam Desktop Application
openSteamWebTitle: Open this item in your default Web Browser
noHistoryFound: No historical sales records found for this item on the Steam Market.
noPeriodHistoryFound: No historical sales records found for this selected period.
steamMarketDesc: Without a Steam login, the Steam Community Market blocks price requests after a short while — returning a 429 Too Many Requests error. Logging in significantly raises this limit, allowing all prices to be fetched reliably. Your account is only used to make market requests; no personal data is stored or shared.
connectSteamWarning: A login window will open — do not close this app until login is complete.
autoPriceRefreshDesc: Prices are automatically refreshed in the background at the selected interval.
highValueAlertsDesc: Get notified when you obtain a new item whose market value is above the set threshold. Set to 0 to disable.
minPriceThresholdHint: Alert on new items worth at least this much
telegramAlertsDesc: Receive instant price alerts and new high-value item notifications directly on your mobile Telegram app (100% free!).
forwardAlertsHint: Forward alerts to your Telegram bot
telegramSetupHint: ℹ️ Setup: 1. Message @BotFather on Telegram, send /newbot to get a Bot Token. 2. Message @GetIDBot to get your Chat ID. 3. Search for your bot and click Start, then click Test Connection above.
saveFileDesc: Real-time sync watches your game's save file automatically. You can also select a custom save file or manually reload.
appSettingsDesc: Configure how the application behaves when closing the window.
closeToTrayHint: Keep running in the system tray when closed
updateReady: An update is ready for installation.
downloadingUpdate: Downloading and preparing to launch setup...
updateFailed: Auto update failed. Opening release page...
privacySteamDesc: Fetches live item prices. No data is sent — read-only requests only.
privacyGithubDesc: Checks for app updates. Only the latest release version number is read.
privacyNotice: Your save file and Steam cookies never leave your device. No analytics, no tracking, no third-party servers.
noListingsFound: No active listings found for sale on Steam.
wishlistEmptyDesc: You are not tracking any items yet. Open any item detail from Stash or Market tabs, and use the Price Alerts & Wishlist card to track prices.
clearHistoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear your Stash Value History? This action cannot be undone.
portfolioActiveDesc: Your Stash value history chart will start drawing once you load save files. We save one snapshot per day to track your progress over time.
trendLineHint: Trend line will start drawing once you load save files on different days.
loadingSaveDataDesc: Please wait while we parse your stash and fetch latest market prices.
noSaveFileDesc: We could not load or decrypt your Task Bar Hero save file from %USERPROFILE%\AppData\LocalLow\TesseractStudio\TaskbarHero\SaveFile_Live.es3.
noSaveFileWarning: Please make sure the game is running, a character has been created, and that you have at least saved once.

uniqueMods.knightBoots: Move between waves at the speed of the fastest party member.
uniqueMods.steelAxe: Attack Speed is amplified by 1% per 1% missing HP.
uniqueMods.basicAttackTriggerReduce: Equipped skill requires 1 less basic attack to trigger.
uniqueMods.knightHelmet: Each time Explosive Bolt kills a monster, Charge Trap cooldown is reduced by 1 second.
uniqueMods.skewerShotBleed: Skewer Shot deals double damage to bleeding enemies.
uniqueMods.explosiveBoltDecrease: Explosive Bolt damage and attack count decrease by 50%.
uniqueMods.turretCooldownReduce: Crossbow Turret cooldown is reduced by 50%.
uniqueMods.iceOrbFreeze: Ice Orb has a 30% chance to freeze chilled enemies on hit.
uniqueMods.snowstormFrozenBonus: Snowstorm deals 100% additional damage to frozen enemies.
uniqueMods.arrowRainCritReduce: When a basic attack critically hits, Arrow Rain cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds.
uniqueMods.cosmicSwordMod: [Cosmic Mod] Holy Strike deals additional damage based on your Defense.
uniqueMods.cosmicScepterMod: [Cosmic Mod] Sanctuary heal rate is increased.
uniqueMods.shieldChargeReset: Resets the cooldown of Shield Charge when it kills a monster.
uniqueMods.divineShieldMod: [Divine Mod] Gain 15% Damage Reduction when blocked.
uniqueMods.wrathOfHeavenHeal: During Wrath of Heaven, basic attacks heal the lowest HP party member by 10% of healing power.
uniqueMods.axeSpinBleed: Axe Spin has a 50% chance to cause bleeding on hit.
